{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{navbox |name = Template:Useful links |title = {{{title|Useful links}}} |listclass = hlist |state =
